title: clematis recta f. pleniflora
intro: Clematis recta f. pleniflora, also known as the Sweet Autumn Clematis, is a flowering plant native to China, characterized by its fragrant, white blooms that appear in late summer and early fall. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which are attributed to its alkaloid and saponin content. The health benefits of Clematis recta f. pleniflora are believed to include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and alleviating menstrual cramps and menopausal symptoms. The plant is often used to make herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be prepared by steeping the flowers in hot water or mixing them with other herbs and plant extracts.
